compiled_state.title: Write test-fix-bug-orchestrator-root.sh (SC5 guard pattern)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Create tests/hooks/test-fix-bug-orchestrator-root.sh. Assertion: grep -c 'WORKTREE_PATH.*ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT|ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT.*WORKTREE_PATH' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md > 0. Tests guard pattern combining both variables (returns 0 before T7 even though ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT alone exists). RED before T7. testing_mode: RED

comments.body: GAP_FINDING: chmod +x required. After creating the .sh file, run chmod +x <file> immediately (CLAUDE.md rule 15). Non-executable .sh files are silently skipped by test gate and pre-commit hooks, masking RED failures as GREEN.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: GAP_FINDING: Clarify grep regex syntax. The alternation pattern 'WORKTREE_PATH.*ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT|ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT.*WORKTREE_PATH' requires extended regex. Use: grep -Ec 'WORKTREE_PATH.*ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT|ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT.*WORKTREE_PATH' plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md Without -E, BRE treats | as literal, count stays 0 even after cb8c-fb92 lands.
comments.author: Test
